default_value.description: Default value used when a query references this variable.

id.description: A UUID string identifying this insight variable.

name.description: Human-readable name for the SQL variable.

projectId.description: Override the active project for this single call only. Does not change the active project — use switch-project for a persistent change. Defaults to the active project when omitted. Must be a project the API key can access, or the call returns a permission error.

type.description:
Variable type. Controls how the value is rendered and substituted in HogQL.

* `String` - String
* `Number` - Number
* `Boolean` - Boolean
* `List` - List
* `Date` - Date

values.description: Allowed values for List variables. Null for other variable types.
